rationale_en: Same phenanthrene class sharing the core ring structure. Both are MRGPRX2 activators causing direct histamine release (pseudo-allergic mechanism). Caution if prior reaction to a phenanthrene opioid.

rationale_en: Different structural class. Phenylpiperidines do not activate MRGPRX2 and do not cause histamine release. 0% cross-reactivity between opioid classes in published re-exposure studies.

panel_rationale_en: When an NMBA is the suspected culprit, consider evaluating all available NMBAs to identify agents with lower expected cross-reactivity for future procedures.
panel_rationale_fr: Lorsqu'un curare est le culprit suspecte, envisager d'evaluer tous les curares disponibles pour identifier les agents avec une reactivite croisee attendue plus faible pour les procedures futures.
